---
title: "LRPBX02: Block-2 taught receptive vocabulary, block-active exposure (TR2)"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_gate_badge.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_key_findings.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_reading_guide.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRPBX02 is a **block-exposure** model for block-2 taught receptive vocabulary (`b2retau`, out of 24): the same staggered block-active exposure association as LRPBX01 (see that chapter for the design), applied to the receptive taught-word count.

Receptive taught vocabulary is near-ceiling and flat across the arms (t3: 16.7 vs 16.6 of 24), so the exposure effect here is expected to be weak or null — the block-2 effect, like block 1, is expressive-specific (taught expressive ≫ taught receptive). This chapter is reported for completeness and as the receptive half of the taught pair.

## Model

Beta-Binomial$(N, \mu\kappa, (1-\mu)\kappa)$ on the block-2 taught-word count, $N = 24$, with
$\operatorname{logit}\mu_{i,t} = \alpha + \alpha_{\text{time}[t]} + \delta\,\text{exposed}_{i,t} + \gamma_A A_{\text{std},t} + \gamma_{\text{ability}}z(\text{blocks}) + \sum_{c}\gamma_c\,z(c) + u_{\text{child}}$, where $\text{exposed}_{i,t}=1$ once child $i$ has been taught block 2 by timepoint $t$ (immediate from t3, wait-list from t4), and the $z(c)$ are the standardised revised-DAG confounders hearing (HS = `hs`) and phonological memory (RW = `erbto`), each with a missing-indicator (read at the t1 baseline). Speech production (`deapp_c`) is a production confounder and is not carried for a receptive outcome. No own-baseline term: block 2 has no t1 score.

![Model diagram](model_graph.png){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_results_block_exposure.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_technical.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
